exercises.details: Keep your jaw and throat relaxed, lowering your larynx. You should feel some resonance in your lips.
exercises.name: May

exercises.details: Move your jaw freely on the "Yum" and maintain the relaxed feeling on the "Ya."
exercises.name: Yum Ya

exercises.details: Maintain a steady airflow and consistent mouth placement.
exercises.name: Three-Note Run

exercises.details: Focus on keeping your lips flexible and your larynx low.
exercises.name: Bumblebee

exercises.details: Focus on smooth jaw movement and keep it free of tension.
exercises.name: Myam Myom

exercises.details: Widen your nasal cavities and envision the sound projecting into the nose and forehead.
exercises.name: Mom Moh

exercises.details: Make a bratty "Nay" sound. You should feel some buzzing in your nose.
exercises.name: Octave Repeat Nay

exercises.details: Make a nasty "Ee" sound. You should feel some resonance in your nose.
exercises.name: Octave Alternate Ee

exercises.details: Sing each repetition on a different vowel. Maintain a steady airflow and consistent mouth placement.
exercises.name: Ascending Run
